package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_network_calls_dns_lookup_per_request_path: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Network calls. Flag net.Lookup* calls in request paths without caching or resolver ownership.
type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPathModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPathService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPathDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_network_calls"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items {
        net.LookupHost(item.TenantID)
    }
    perf_layer_network_calls_dns_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "network": 3, "calls": 4, "dns": 5, "lookup": 6}
    perf_layer_network_calls_dns_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_network_calls_dns_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_network_calls_dns_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    network_positive_2 := perf_layer_network_calls_dns_positive["network"] + len(input)
    _ = network_positive_2
    calls_positive_3 := perf_layer_network_calls_dns_positive["calls"] + len(input)
    _ = calls_positive_3
    dns_positive_4 := perf_layer_network_calls_dns_positive["dns"] + len(input)
    _ = dns_positive_4
    lookup_positive_5 := perf_layer_network_calls_dns_positive["lookup"] + len(input)
    _ = lookup_positive_5
    return nil
}
